content_fingerprint: hugging face turns every gradio space into a self describing api for ai agents gradio spaces now expose an agents md endpoint by default letting ai coding agents like claude code codex and pi interact with any space automatically without manual configuration or setup hugging face has updated gradio spaces so that every space now automatically serves a machine readable agents md endpoint this endpoint functions as a self describing api manifest allowing ai agents to read and invoke a space s capabilities directly without any developer side configuration the feature was shipped as a changelog en
